title: Display bike logo image to the left of the Cleanio wordmark in the header

requirements.text: In the Layout component header, place the user-uploaded bike logo image to the left of the 'Cleanio' wordmark. The logo image must be rendered as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/cleanio-logo.png, sized proportionally to fit the header height, and displayed inline beside the brand name on all pages.

quotes: can you please upload bike logo given above in image to left side of the brand Cleanio

acceptanceCriteria: The bike logo image appears immediately to the left of the 'Cleanio' text in the sticky header on all pages.
The logo height is proportional and fits within the header bar without overflow or distortion.
The logo and wordmark are visually aligned (vertically centered) in the header.

constraints: Do not modify any immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, ui components).
Use the existing cleanio-logo.png asset already present in the project; do not replace or regenerate it unless an edit is explicitly requested.
nonGoals: Changing any other aspect of the header or navigation layout.
Modifying backend data models or booking logic.
Restyling the overall brand theme or color palette.
